title: Classic SQL Injection
description: User-controllable input concatenated into SQL queries without parameterization.
validation: Send single-quote, observe error or behavioral difference; confirm with boolean/time-based payload.
remediation: Use parameterized queries / prepared statements; deny dynamic table/column names from user input.

title: Reflected XSS
description: User input rendered into HTML response without contextual escaping.
validation: Inject `<svg/onload=alert(1)>`; confirm execution in browser DOM.
remediation: Contextual output encoding; CSP with strict default-src.

title: Insecure Direct Object Reference
description: Object identifiers in URLs/bodies are honored without per-request authorization check.
validation: Replace own object id with another tenant's; confirm read/write success.
remediation: Server-side authorization on every object access; opaque, non-enumerable identifiers.

title: Server-Side Request Forgery
description: Server fetches URLs supplied by the user without egress restriction.
validation: Submit `http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/` (AWS) or DNS callback; observe issuance.
remediation: Egress allow-list; block link-local/metadata IPs; resolve once and pin.

title: Open Redirect
description: Redirect destination is taken from user-controllable parameter without allow-listing.
remediation: Allow-list of permitted redirect destinations; sign or hash the target.
